summary: Second, thorough pass over the under-extracted pages (Tables A-pre-Oils, C, D/E, F, G, and blank p14) to recover missed type sub-headers.

pages.confidence: Found 17 bold TYPE sub-headers on page 1, all within the single "Table A: Magical Liquids" banner. This is the FIRST page of the Appendix (title "Magical Item Random Determination Tables" + intro text + the "Table 1: Magical Items" category list fill the left column), so there is NO continuation-from-prior-page section at the top. The bold headers are: Enchanted Enhancements* (01), Arcane Formulae for a Dracolich (02-03), Arcane Formulae for a Lich (04-05), Cordial of the Dryad Elixirs (06-07), Glitz & Klax's (13-14), Nerve Tonic (26-27), Nodozze (28-29), Physical Enhancement (34), Quirks* (35-36), Rainbow Bridge (37-38), Skunk Water (45-46), Essence of Darkness (54-55), Ichor of Intoxication (56-57), Liquid Iron (58), Liquid Road (59-60), Mist of Rapture (61-62), and Oils (63-64, category header whose first item is Absinthe). All were verified via high-resolution image crops; the OCR text layer was unreliable (scanned image). None were faint or ambiguous — bold vs. non-bold was clearly distinguishable at high zoom (the many "of X" potion entries are regular weight and were correctly excluded). Confidence high. Note: the Oils alphabetical list ("of Cloaking" … "Jazper's of Permanent Etherealness") runs down the entire right column and continues onto page 2, but no additional bold sub-header appears within it on this page.

I found 2 bold TYPE sub-headers on page 4. The first, "Scrolls" (top of column 1, first item 331-340 Mondasso's Automated Spell), is a continuation of the Scrolls table from the previous page but IS itself printed in bold at the top of this page. The second is "Enchanted Enhancements*" (01-03), which sits under the "Roll / Item Discovered" column-label row beneath the bold "Table C: Rings" banner in the lower-left. Columns 2 and 3 contain only the alphabetical "of X" Scroll entries (04-07 of Affliction through 565-568 Moodarvian of Taste) with NO additional bold TYPE sub-headers interrupting them. Note: "Roll / Item Discovered" is a column-label row, not a TYPE header, so I excluded it. The asterisk on "Enchanted Enhancements*" is present in the source. Nothing was faint or ambiguous; the two bold headers are clear.

Found 8 bold TYPE sub-headers on page 5. The page has 3 columns covering the tail of the Rings table (col 1 and top of col 2/3), then "Table D: Rods" (col 2) and "Table E: Staves" (col 3). The Rings section at top is a continuation from the prior page; I captured it under "Rings" with its first roll 569-571 (Moodarvian of Touch). Under Table D: Rods I found three headers: Enchanted Enhancements* (01-15), Moto Moto Rods (16-30), and Rods (76-90). Under Table E: Staves I found four headers: Enchanted Enhancements* (01-07), Canes (08-14), Gaffs (51-57), and Staves (80-86). All headers were legible and unambiguous; none were faint. Note the "Enchanted Enhancements*" and "Moto Moto Rods" / "Gnomewrecker" spellings carry the asterisk/odd wording exactly as printed. Confidence is high.

Found 2 bold TYPE sub-headers on page 6 (physical p1572): "Staves" (a continuation from the prior page — the Staves list of Table E continues at the top of column 1, running 123-129 through 993-000) and "Enchanted Enhancements*" under the "Table F: Wands" banner (the wand list, 01-08 through 906-913, is one long list under this single sub-header). Both headers are clear and legible; none were faint or ambiguous. Note that "Table F: Wands" and its "Roll / Item Discovered" column labels are banner/column headings rather than TYPE sub-headers, and the Wands table has no further per-type bold sub-headers on this page beyond "Enchanted Enhancements*".

Found 7 bold sub-headers on page 7 (book page 1573): Wands (top-left, a continuation from the previous page — its header repeats at the column top, first visible item 914-922 of Whips), Manuals (top-middle, 197-200 Grim Grimoire), Maps (middle column, 212-214 Dane's Version), then under the "Table G: Books" banner: Enchanted Enhancements* (01-03, the starred lead-in row printed just under the Roll/Item Discovered column header), Books (04-07 of Binding Souls), Librams (51-54 Analect of Magic), and Spellbooks (281-283 The Alcaister). The previous under-extraction most likely missed Manuals, Maps, and/or the small "Enchanted Enhancements*" and "Librams" sub-headers. All headers were legible; the only mild ambiguity is whether "Enchanted Enhancements*" should count as its own sub-header versus a footnoted lead row of the Books table — I included it to be exhaustive.

Page 14 (book page 1580) is a full-page color illustration of a battle scene (a mounted warrior with a raised sword, fallen and standing figures, a burning structure, and birds in a stormy sky). It contains NO roll tables, NO bold TYPE sub-headers, and NO "Table X: Category" banners. The only text on the page is the page number "1580". Therefore I found 0 headers. Nothing was faint or ambiguous — the page is simply artwork, not a table, so there was nothing to under-extract in a prior pass.
